reviews.comment:
Fiera como toda YPF losbaños limpios y los playeros de 10 pero la estación es fea estéticamente ponganle más onda si son millonarios manga de ratas

(Translated by Google)
Like all YPF stations, it's fierce. The bathrooms are clean and the attendants are great, but the station itself is aesthetically unappealing. They should put more effort into it if they're millionaires, you bunch of cheapskates.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXMjR6WlhREAE
